AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class XmlService

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Services
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Provides asynchronous load/save operations for XML documents (XDocument) with cross-target support for net48 and modern .NET runtimes.

public sealed class XmlService : IXmlService
Inheritance
object
XmlService
Implements
IXmlService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
Extension Methods
UnitExtensions.ToUnitLabel(object)
ReflectionUtils.GetHighlightProperty(object)
ReflectionUtils.SetPropertyValue(object, PropertyInfo, object)
SystemExtensions.Cast<T>(object)

Remarks

LoadXmlAsync(string, CancellationToken) opens the file with ReadWrite to allow reading XML that may be open or being written by other processes. Line information is preserved via SetLineInfo to improve diagnostics and error reporting.

SaveXmlAsync(XDocument, string, CancellationToken) writes to a temporary file and then atomically replaces/moves the destination. This reduces the risk of leaving a partially written XML file when an error or cancellation occurs.

On modern runtimes (non-NET48), the implementation uses async readers/writers and prohibits DTD processing to reduce XML-related security risks.

Constructors

XmlService() 

public XmlService()

Methods

LoadXmlAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Loads an XML document from disk.

public Task<XDocument> LoadXmlAsync(string filePath, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

filePath string

Path to the XML file to load.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token.

Returns

Task<XDocument>

The loaded XDocument.

Remarks

The file is opened with ReadWrite to allow reading XML that may be open or being written by other processes. Line information is preserved via SetLineInfo.

On NET48, this method loads synchronously using Load(Stream, LoadOptions) due to framework limitations.

On modern runtimes, this method loads asynchronously using System.Xml.Linq.XDocument.LoadAsync(System.Xml.XmlReader, LoadOptions, CancellationToken) with Async enabled and DTD processing prohibited.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when filePath is null/empty/whitespace.

Autodesk.Revit.Exceptions.OperationCanceledException

Thrown when cancellation is requested.

SaveXmlAsync(XDocument, string, CancellationToken)

Saves an XML document to disk using a temporary file and atomic replace/move.

public Task SaveXmlAsync(XDocument doc, string filePath, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

doc XDocument

The document to save.

filePath string

Destination file path.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token.

Returns

Task

Remarks

The destination directory is created if it does not exist.

The file is written to {filePath}.tmp first. If the destination exists, it is replaced using Replace(string, string, string); otherwise, the temp file is moved into place.

The temp file is deleted in a finally block as best-effort cleanup.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when doc is null or filePath is null/empty/whitespace.

Autodesk.Revit.Exceptions.OperationCanceledException

Thrown when cancellation is requested.
